description: As a mobile user, I want to navigate to the controls screen and interact with form elements so that I can verify input fields and checkboxes work correctly.

steps.name: Given  The user launches the ApiDemos application
When  The user taps on the "Views" menu

steps.name: And  The user taps on the "Controls" option
And  The user taps on the "1. Light Theme" option
And  The user enters "QA Automation Test" into the text input field
And  The user taps on the checkbox to toggle its state
Then  The checkbox should be selected
